suppressWarnings(library(tidyverse))
suppressWarnings(library(readxl))

# 1. 读取原始数据
df <- read_excel("fig1d.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet1")

# 2. 数据处理：固定分组顺序
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Day = factor(Day, levels = c("Day 0", "Day 28")),
    Diet = factor(Diet, levels = c("CON", "LM"))
  )

# 3. 绘图：箱线图白色填充+散点彩色，和原图完全一致
ggplot(df, aes(x = Diet, y = shannon)) +
  # 箱线图：白色填充，黑色边框，中位数线加粗
  geom_boxplot(
    fill = "white", 
    color = "black", 
    width = 0.6, 
    outlier.shape = NA,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  # 散点图：按Day分组上色，和原图颜色一致
  geom_jitter(
    aes(color = Day),
    width = 0.2, 
    size = 3, 
    stroke = 0.5
  ) +
  # 分面：Day0/Day28横向排列
  facet_wrap(~Day, nrow = 1, ncol = 2, scales = "fixed") +
  # 散点颜色：Day0红色，Day28蓝绿色
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Day 0" = "#E67373", "Day 28" = "#40B8A0")) +
  # Y轴设置：和原图范围/刻度一致
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Shannon diversity",
    limits = c(2, 5.5),
    breaks = c(3, 4, 5),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "") +
  # 显著性文字：硬编码，避免乱码
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 1.5, y = 5.2,
    label = "Wilcoxon, P = 0.77",
    size = 5,
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 3.5, y = 5.2,
    label = "Wilcoxon, P = 0.002",
    size = 5,
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  # 主题：隐藏图例，和原图一致
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = "white"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16)
  )

# 保存高清图
ggsave(
  "Fig1d_最终复刻.png",
  height = 8,
  width = 12,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)
